name: full-package-creation-flow
description: Orchestrates iterative package authoring and validation by coordinating requirements analysis, source drafting, submission review, and registry compliance checks.

inputs.name: user-intent
inputs.description: A free-form description of what the user wants the package to do or contain.

outputs.name: validated-package-source
outputs.description: The fully authored, reviewed, and registry-valid package source tree ready for release preparation.
